title: Claude Oceanus V1-P (Mythos?- FULLY TESTED): I TESTED IT & IT'S ACTUALLY CRAZY!
summary: AICodeKing tested a leaked model appearing as Oceanus V1-P (possibly linked to Mythos) across coding, visual, reasoning, and game tasks using OpenCode benchmarking. The model achieved perfect scores and outperformed Opus, GPT-5.5, Gemini 3.5 Flash, DeepSeek V4 Pro, and other competitors in the tested domains.
